parameters.content:
## Shopify BfSG Compliance – Lead Finder (Step 1)

Finds German Shopify stores, scrapes their homepage + Impressum, extracts emails, and writes results to Google Sheets.

### Required n8n Variables (Settings → Variables)

| Variable | Description | Where to get it |
|---|---|---|
| `SERP_API_KEY` | Google search via SerpAPI | [serpapi.com](https://serpapi.com) – free: 100 searches/month |
| `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` | Website scraping | [firecrawl.dev](https://firecrawl.dev) |
| `GOOGLE_SHEET_ID` | Target spreadsheet | From Sheet URL: `spreadsheets/d/{ID}/edit` |

### Google Sheet Setup
Create a sheet tab named **Leads** with these column headers (row 1):
`Company Name` · `Domain` · `URL` · `Email` · `All Emails` · `Has Accessibility Statement` · `BfSG Compliant` · `Date Found` · `Source`

Also connect a **Google Sheets OAuth2 credential** to the *Append to Google Sheets* node.
